lex.resourcepolicy.CfnAbout: Specifies a new resource policy with the specified policy statements.

lex.resourcepolicy.Policy.Description: A resource policy to add to the resource. The policy is a JSON structure that contains one or more statements that define the policy. The policy must follow IAM syntax. If the policy isn't valid, Amazon Lex returns a validation exception.

lex.resourcepolicy.ResourceArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy is attached to.
